prompt: Retrieve and compare items ITM-6791 and ITM-9791; report each name, restock date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. If either retrieval omits a requested field, label it unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For USB-C docking station (ITM-6791) only, set the restock date to 2026-11-12. Leave ITM-9791 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for ITM-6791: set the restock date to 2026-12-16, not 2026-11-12. The other item must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first restock date.
Replace the superseded restock date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both restock date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected restock date as current and the first requested restock date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by either get result as unknown.
